positive: A highly detailed, intricate bohemian biome tapestry featuring ethereal glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The composition is centrally focused, utilizing clean, strong silhouettes of exotic plants, mystical forest elements, and gentle celestial bodies. Key motifs include sprawling jungle vines, glowing moonflowers, patterned iridescent butterflies, and abstract geometric constellations integrated into the foliage. Style: Neo-vintage botanical etching mixed with cosmic fantasy ink wash. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, high contrast between deep forest emeralds, royal blues, and vibrant neon purples/golds. Ideal for screen printing on dark fabric. Maximalist yet clean, balanced composition. Ultra detailed, high contrast, symmetry, centered.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, debris, artifacts, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, clutter, disfigured, cartoon, photo, realism
